1.title: CPU usage
1.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Memory usage
2.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

3.title: Disk usage
3.query:
timeseries percent = avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(percent) desc
| limit 10

4.title: CPU Usage
4.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

5.title: Memory usage
5.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 10

6.title: Disk usage
6.query:
timeseries percent = avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(percent) desc
| limit 10

7.title: Network errors sent
7.query:
timeseries errors_tx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.packets.errors_tx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host, dt.entity.network_interface }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd network_interface_name = entityName(dt.entity.network_interface)
| sort arrayAvg(errors_tx) desc
| limit 10

8.title: Network errors received
8.query:
timeseries errors_rx = avg(dt.host.net.nic.packets.errors_rx, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.host, dt.entity.network_interface }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd network_interface_name = entityName(dt.entity.network_interface)
| sort arrayAvg(errors_rx) desc
| limit 10
